note: Official infotech.gov.ua embedded answer key (image QNS_4072.jpg, blue bus, crossed-out 'Одеса' end-of-locality signs) marks '110 км/год.' is_correct:true. Per ПДР 12.6(ґ) a regular microbus on a road with separate carriageways divided by a median strip = 110 km/h. Our options index of '110 км/год.' is 5. Corroborated by testpdr.online acceptedAnswer=110. Target is the 5-option minibus-speed variant (matches reads v11:5), not the 3-option brake-air question sharing this key.
